'''R4-B11''' was a [[R4 astromech droid/Legends|R4 astromech droid]] owned by [[Slythor]] the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He was known to be cranky and destructive.

==Biography==
The droid's owner soon got tired of its inability to handle simple tasks and had the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] disassembled and rebuilt as an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]. The unit's familiar appearance as an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] allowed it to get close to its targets. Slythor often included the droid in trades whenever he wanted to recover what he gave away. After the unit was traded, it would kill its new owners and return to Slythor, who would recover the other objects that he wanted.
